name: Lentil Rice Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover lentils with water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 1-1 1/2 hours.
2. Drain the liquid, reserving half.
3. Heat 1/4 cup water in a large pot over medium-low heat. Add onion, garlic, and celery. Cook until tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes, drained lentils, reserved lentil water, cooked rice, and dill weed to the pot. Mix well.
5. Pour the mixture into a 3-quart casserole dish. Sprinkle breadcrumbs on the bottom.
6. Cover with remaining breadcrumbs and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
7. This can be made ahead of time; if so, add 15 minutes to the baking time.
